channel.title: GitHub Pascal Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Pascal in GitHub

item.title: cheat-engine/cheat-engine
item.description: Cheat Engine. A development environment focused on modding

item.title: doublecmd/doublecmd
item.description: Double Commander is a free cross platform open source file manager with two panels side by side.

item.title: benjamimgois/goverlay
item.description: Goverlay is an easy graphical interface to configure linux gaming applications

item.title: jrsoftware/issrc
item.description: Inno Setup is an open-source installation builder for Windows applications by Jordan Russell and Martijn Laan. Since its introduction in 1997, Inno Setup has been trusted by developers and organizations of all sizes to reliably deploy software to millions of PCs worldwide.

item.title: keymanapp/keyman
item.description: Keyman cross platform input methods system running on Android, iOS, Linux, macOS, Windows and mobile and desktop web

item.title: peazip/PeaZip
item.description: Free Zip / Unzip software and Rar file extractor. Cross-platform file and archive manager. Features volume spanning, compression, authenticated encryption. Supports 7Z, 7-Zip sfx, ACE, ARJ, Brotli, BZ2, CAB, CHM, CPIO, DEB, GZ, ISO, JAR, LHA/LZH, NSIS, OOo, PAQ/LPAQ, PEA, QUAD, RAR, RPM, split, TAR, Z, ZIP, ZIPX, Zstandard.

item.title: Embarcadero/Dev-Cpp
item.description: A fast, portable, simple, and free C/C++ IDE

item.title: UltraStar-Deluxe/USDX
item.description: The free and open source karaoke singing game UltraStar Deluxe, inspired by Sony SingStar™

item.title: nofeletru/UsbAsp-flash
item.description: Program allow you to program flash memory on the protocols spi, I2C, MicroWire. Supports CH341a, CH347, UsbAsp, AVRISP(LUFA), Arduino, FT232H.

item.title: TES5Edit/TES5Edit
item.description: xEdit by Elminster; Updated and maintained by Sharlikran, Zilav, and Hlp

item.title: Runixe786/MD3-Windows
item.description: Material you widgets for your windows desktop, adaptable with wallpaper colors with both light & dark modes

item.title: joaopauloschuler/neural-api
item.description: CAI NEURAL API - Pascal based deep learning neural network API optimized for AVX, AVX2 and AVX512 instruction sets plus OpenCL capable devices including AMD, Intel and NVIDIA.

item.title: HeidiSQL/HeidiSQL
item.description: A lightweight client for managing MariaDB, MySQL, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Interbase and Firebird, written in Delphi and Lazarus/FreePascal

item.title: lmbelo/pyscripter
item.description: Pyscripter is a feature-rich but lightweight Python IDE

item.title: transmission-remote-gui/transgui
item.description: 🧲 A feature rich cross platform Transmission BitTorrent client. Faster and has more functionality than the built-in web GUI.
